{{CargoOrgan
|name=Stone Abs
|type=Bionic
|rank=green
|id=10647
|idx=3
|description=With professional training and "totally safe" experimental drugs, even couch potatoes can grow eight rock-hard abs in months!
|skill=When attacked by the enemy, trigger the protection of the Golden Shield, reducing DMG by 21% of the enemy's ATK!
|hp=580
|def=55
|atk=57
|rush=37
|gene1=In explorations, {race} DEF +20
|gene2=In explorations, DMG REDUC +5%
|gene7=In explorations, {race} DEF +60 (Awakened)
|}}
